nodes.label: AI accuracy and correctness
nodes.grounding_span: gemini pro is overall more correct most of the time

nodes.label: AI convenience and integration
nodes.grounding_span: copilot is convenient when just providing the files as context and sometimes it gets distracted by irrelevant parts of the code

nodes.label: AI as implementation executor
nodes.grounding_span: I would come up with a basic idea of how I want to implement it... and provide this to AI

nodes.label: AI assistance in unfamiliar domains
nodes.grounding_span: AI really helped me go over all the details and actually create the playbook with the correct tasks

nodes.label: Human creative and strategic work
nodes.grounding_span: Tasks like organizing notes, coming up with ideas, designing products or anything in general I prefer to do myself

nodes.label: Skill maintenance through personal projects
nodes.label_negative: Skill atrophy due to AI reliance
nodes.grounding_span: I try to practice my own skills by working on my own side projects/apps in my downtime

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: AI makes our workflow significantly faster with few mistakes

nodes.label: Personal competence and skill growth
nodes.grounding_span: I try to practice my own skills by working on my own side projects

nodes.label: Creative autonomy and subjective judgment
nodes.grounding_span: these are things I enjoy doing and also want to put more effort in, as they do often require a bit more subjective perspective

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI in unfamiliar domain
nodes.grounding_span: A time I was very satisfied with AI was when I worked on a yaml playbook

nodes.label: Hesitation overcome by experience
nodes.grounding_span: I was hesitant at first because I wasnt sure how reliable it would be but my colleagues encourage me to use it

nodes.label: Preference for human creativity over AI
nodes.grounding_span: Tasks like organizing notes, coming up with ideas, designing products or anything in general I prefer to do myself

nodes.label: Cautious reliance on AI
nodes.grounding_span: I also try to not fully rely on it, making sure to double check everything because I know it can hallucinate or make mistakes

nodes.label: Architectural planning before execution
nodes.grounding_span: I would come up with a basic idea of how I want to implement it... identify which files I want to create in which folders

nodes.label: Strategic tool selection based on task complexity
nodes.grounding_span: I enjoy copilot for quick/easier tasks... But gemini pro is overall more correct most of the time
